rationale: Educ. Code §13.151 governs school district consolidation procedures and is wholly unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 13.151. DISTRICTS THAT MAY CONSOLIDATE. (a) By the procedure provided by this subchapter, two or more school districts may consolidate into a single school district.
_note: Rule text concerns district consolidation only; no bearing on homestead exemption.
